checks.desc: HiDiscovery should be disabled in production (§2.11.2)
Management should not be on default VLAN 1 (§2.11.5)
Unused ports should be admin-disabled (§2.11.8)
PoE should be disabled if not required (§2.11.9)
Auto software update from external memory should be disabled (§2.11.10)
Unsigned firmware upload should be rejected (§2.11.11)
Config write to external memory should be disabled (§2.11.12)
Config load from external memory should be disabled (§2.11.14)
Insecure management protocols should be disabled (§2.11.16)
Unused industrial protocols should be disabled (§2.11.16)
Management IP access restrictions should be configured (§2.11.17)
Login policy should enforce lockout and minimum password length (§2.11.21)
Password policy should require complexity (§2.11.22)
Session timeouts should not be excessive (§2.11.24)
Time synchronization should be configured (§2.11.25)
Remote syslog should be configured (§2.11.27)
SNMPv1 traps should be disabled (§2.11.28)
Pre-login banner should be configured (§2.11.30)
SNMPv3 traps should be configured for monitoring (§2.11.29)
SNMPv1/v2 write access should be disabled (§2.11.28 2A)
SNMPv3 should use HMAC-SHA over HMAC-MD5 for authentication
SNMPv3 should use AES-128 over DES for encryption
DNS client configuration should be reviewed
Device security sense monitors should all be enabled
